positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical illustration of a crescent moon cradling a group of bioluminescent celestial flora and fauna. The main subject is a trio of glowing crystalline mushrooms nestled among deep indigo and emerald foliage. The style is a perfect blend of Art Nouveau and modern vector graphics, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong, high-contrast linework. Composition must be centralized and perfectly balanced for apparel printing. Lighting should emanate softly from the flora, casting vibrant cyan and lime green accents against a deep, matte midnight blue background. No gradients, only solid color blocks and crisp outlines. Intricate detail, flat dimensionality.
